summary: Decent homemade matrix recording of a lackluster, novelty‑type show with spotty performances
review: The tape is a homemade matrix that mitigates an otherwise weak FM source and delivers surprisingly good sound despite some phase issues. Musically the concert is described as sloppy, lackluster and a weird variety showcase, though it still holds interest for collectors because of its unusual guests.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is judged poor to average (sloppy, spotty) while the recording is deemed good for a matrix; weighted averaging yields a sub‑3 star rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Phase problems noted in mixes; FM source deficient but matrix improves clarity, overall decent homemade matrix sound.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a novelty/variety show with spotty performances and an odd ending to the MSG run; generally sloppy and lackluster.
